Item 1A. Risk Factors

The Company depends on suppliers and contract manufacturers for components, manufacturing, logistics, and inventory availability. Supply chain disruption, component shortages, or delays could materially adversely affect product availability and revenue.

The markets for the Company's products are highly competitive and subject to aggressive pricing, short product cycles, and rapid technological change.

Item 1B. Unresolved Staff Comments

None.

Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Net sales depend on customer demand for products and services across geographic regions. Demand may be affected by macroeconomic conditions, consumer confidence, and foreign currency movements.

Item 8. Financial Statements

Financial statements follow.
